eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Texas; at 1:10 PM on JUN 24, 2026 Effective until 4:10 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
AMBER Alert: Child Abduction from Big Spring, Texas. Missing child is Audrey Rich, 14 year old White Female. Suspects are Steven Rich, 48 year old White Male and Melissa Rich, 49 year old White Female. Call Big Spring Police Department with information. If seen call 9 1 1.
